treatment_information.treatment_response: dramatic neurologic deterioration occurred, resulting in a comatose state necessitating endotracheal intubation, sedation, and transfer to the intensive care unit
patient developed severe and progressive encephalopathy despite treatment

treatment_timeline.event: chemotherapy commenced using the combination of carboplatinum and etoposide with intravenous corticosteroids
dramatic neurologic deterioration occurred, resulting in a comatose state necessitating endotracheal intubation, sedation, and transfer to the intensive care unit
patient died 10 days later due to severe and progressive encephalopathy
